## 📋 Today's Overview
*April 27, 2026*

### Superconductivity (10 new today)

1. The study focuses on (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ films, employing X-ray absorption spectroscopy and resonant inelastic scattering to address the microscopic pathway from the parent phase to the superconducting phase under compressive epitaxial strain.
2. The study focuses on PrFeAs(O,F) with Mn substitution, employing structural, Raman, DFT, transport, and magnetic measurements to address the role of magnetic impurities in suppressing superconductivity.
3. The study focuses on alkali-metal intercalated bilayer PdTe2, employing first-principles calculations within the fully anisotropic Migdal-Eliashberg framework to address the enhancement of superconductivity and the two-dome-like evolution of Tc.
4. The study focuses on transmon qubits, employing a pedagogical introduction to pulse-shaping techniques to address the need for high-fidelity control accounting for multiple error channels.
5. The study focuses on high-pressure MnB4, employing density-functional theory and spin fluctuation calculations to address the discrepancy between experimental superconductivity and ab initio predictions of low Tc.
6. The study focuses on 1313 phase La3Ni2O7, employing DFT+DMFT and RPA to address the electronic properties and pairing mechanism of superconductivity under pressure.
7. The study focuses on the kagome metal VSn, employing theoretical predictions to address the observation of charge density wave and tunable superconductivity in a non-magnetic 1:1 stoichiometry material.
8. The study focuses on superconducting-qubit tune-up, employing a QuTiP hierarchical-equations-of-motion solver with a 1/f Burkard bath to address non-Markovian bath signatures elided by Markovian calibration.
9. The study focuses on superconducting quantum processors, employing a precise and adaptive error model to address the need for accurate synthetic data for quantum error correction decoders.
10. The study focuses on superconducting and ion-trap quantum architectures, employing benchmarking protocols to address the measurement of underlying quantumness for assessing practical readiness.

| 1 | **[$3d_{z^2}$ orbital delocalization and magnetic collapse in superconducting (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21899v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The recent discovery of Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelate thin-film superconductors has opened a new frontier in unconventional superconductivity. Its realization requires both compressive epitaxial strain and highly oxidative growth conditions, yet the microscopic pathway from the parent phase to the superconducting phase remains elusive. Here, X-ray absorption spectroscopy and resonant inelastic X-ray scattering are employed to track this evolution by independently tuning strain and oxygen content in (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ thin films. We uncover a remarkable two-step evolution. First, signatures of delocalization emerge in the same way upon two independent tunings: spectral weight transfers from an upper Hubbard-like peak to the hole-like peak associated with the O $2p_z$ state, and in parallel, the initially localized Ni $3d_{z^2}$ orbital becomes more itinerant, accompanied by the broadening and weakening of $dd$ orbital excitations. Second, as itinerancy increases, long-range spin-density-wave (SDW) order is suppressed in both intensity and correlation length, indicating direct competition with superconductivity. Yet, short-range magnons persist: they become damped, but their bandwidth remains unchanged. Our results paint a coherent picture in which both strain and oxygenation drive the RP bilayer nickelates towards superconducting instability, where the O $2p_z$ and Ni $3d_{z^2}$ orbitals become delocalized. Concomitantly, the long-range magnetic order loses coherence and is suppressed. These findings establish an orbital-selective route to RP nickelate superconductivity, in which the delocalization of the interlayer $3d_{z^2}$-$2p_z$-$3d_{z^2}$ molecular orbital and the robust short-range magnons upon the melting of SDW order are prerequisites, providing strong constraints for theory and a roadmap for designing nickelate superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期发现的Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) 相镍酸盐薄膜超导体为非常规超导开辟了新前沿。其实现需要同时满足压缩外延应变和强氧化性生长条件，然而从母相到超导相的微观路径仍不明确。本文通过独立调控(La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$薄膜中的应变和氧含量，利用X射线吸收光谱和共振非弹性X射线散射追踪这一演化过程。我们揭示了一个显著的两步演化过程。首先，在两种独立调控方式下，退局域化的特征以相同方式显现：谱权重从类似上哈伯德带的峰转移到与O $2p_z$态相关的空穴峰，同时初始局域的Ni $3d_{z^2}$轨道变得更加巡游，伴随$dd$轨道激发的展宽和减弱。其次，随着巡游性增强，长程自旋密度波序的强度和关联长度均受到抑制，表明其与超导存在直接竞争。然而，短程磁振子依然存在：它们变得阻尼，但带宽保持不变。我们的结果描绘了一幅连贯的图像：应变和氧化共同驱动RP双层镍酸盐趋向超导不稳定性，在此过程中O $2p_z$和Ni $3d_{z^2}$轨道发生退局域化。同时，长程磁序失去相干性并受到抑制。这些发现确立了通往RP镍酸盐超导的轨道选择性路径，其中层间$3d_{z^2}$-$2p_z$-$3d_{z^2}$分子轨道的退局域化以及自旋密度波序熔化后稳健的短程磁振子是先决条件，为理论提供了强约束，并为设计镍酸盐超导体提供了路线图。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Xiaoyang Chen et al. |
| 2 | **[Effect of Mn Substitution on Superconductivity in PrFeAs(O,F): Role of Magnetic Impurities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21684v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate Mn substitution at the Fe site in PrFe1-xMnxAsO0.7F0.3 (0 to 0.1) using structural, Raman, density functional theory (DFT), transport, and magnetic measurements. X-ray diffraction and Raman analyses confirm preferential Mn incorporation into the FeAs planes, accompanied by lattice expansion and suppression of Fe-related vibrational modes. Electrical transport reveals a systematic decrease of the superconducting transition temperature from 48 K (x = 0) to complete suppression at x = 0.1, together with low-temperature resistivity upturns evolving toward insulating-like behavior. Magnetization and magnetotransport measurements show degradation of superconducting coherence, critical current density, upper critical field, and vortex activation energy with increasing Mn content. The results demonstrate that Mn acts as an efficient magnetic impurity, strongly perturbing the electronic and magnetic environment of the FeAs layers. Comparative analysis indicates relatively enhanced robustness of superconductivity in the Pr-based system, highlighting the role of rare-earth-dependent electronic correlations in impurity effects.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用结构、拉曼光谱、密度泛函理论、输运和磁性测量，研究了PrFe1-xMnxAsO0.7F0.3 (0至0.1)中Fe位的Mn替代效应。X射线衍射和拉曼分析证实Mn优先掺入FeAs面内，伴随晶格膨胀和Fe相关振动模式的抑制。电输运显示超导转变温度从48 K (x = 0) 系统性降低至x = 0.1时的完全抑制，同时低温电阻率上翘行为演变为类绝缘体行为。磁化强度和磁输运测量表明，随着Mn含量增加，超导相干性、临界电流密度、上临界场和涡旋激活能均发生退化。结果表明Mn作为有效的磁性杂质，强烈扰动FeAs层的电子和磁环境。对比分析表明Pr基体系中超导性具有相对增强的鲁棒性，突显了稀土依赖的电子关联在杂质效应中的作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Priya Singh et al. |
| 3 | **[Two-gap to Single-gap Transition and Two-dome-like Superconductivity in Alkali-Metal Intercalated Bilayer PdTe2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21635v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>PdTe2 has been synthesized with controllable thickness down to the monolayer limit. Based on first-principles calculations within the fully anisotropic Migdal-Eliashberg framework, this work reveals that alkali-metal intercalation markedly enhances the weak superconductivity of bilayer PdTe2, boosting the transition temperature from 1.4 K to 5.0 -13.5 K and yielding a two-dome-like evolution of Tc. Rubidium intercalation induces the highest Tc of 13.5 K, which can be further increased to 14.5 K under biaxial tensile strain. The strain-dependent evolution of Tc also exhibits a two-dome-like behavior, reflecting the interplay between strain-induced band structure modifications and electron-phonon coupling (EPC). Moreover, a systematic correlation is identified between interlayer interaction and superconducting gap. Lithium intercalation induces a distinct two-gap state, whereas intercalants with larger atomic radii (Na, K, Rb, and Cs) drive the system into a single-gap character. The two-gap to single-gap transition originates from the modulation of interlayer coupling through intercalation-induced interlayer expansion. In addition, pristine and Li/Na-intercalated bilayers exhibit nontrivial band topology, suggesting that layered PdTe2 provides a promising platform for realizing the coexistence of superconductivity and nontrivial topology. These results provide detailed anisotropic insights into EPC and offer viable pathways for enhancing Tc and achieving diverse properties in layered PdTe2 systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>已合成出厚度可控至单层极限的PdTe2。基于全各向异性Migdal-Eliashberg框架的第一性原理计算，本工作揭示碱金属插层显著增强了双层PdTe2的弱超导性，将转变温度从1.4 K提升至5.0-13.5 K，并产生Tc的双穹顶状演化。铷插层诱导出13.5 K的最高Tc，在双轴拉伸应变下可进一步提高至14.5 K。Tc随应变的变化也表现出双穹顶状行为，反映了应变诱导的能带结构修饰与电声耦合之间的相互作用。此外，层间相互作用与超导能隙之间建立了系统性的关联。锂插层诱导出独特的双能隙态，而具有较大原子半径的插层剂（Na、K、Rb和Cs）则驱动体系进入单能隙特征。从双能隙到单能隙的转变源于插层引起的层间膨胀对层间耦合的调制。此外，原始及Li/Na插层的双层体系表现出非平庸的能带拓扑，表明层状PdTe2为实现超导与非平庸拓扑共存提供了有前景的平台。这些结果为电声耦合提供了详细各向异性见解，并为提高Tc和在层状PdTe2体系中实现多样化性质提供了可行途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Yu-Lin Han et al. |
| 4 | **[Pulse Shaping for Superconducting Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21565v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>High-fidelity control of superconducting qubits requires carefully shaped microwave pulses that account for multiple error channels. In this work, we present a pedagogical introduction to pulse-shaping techniques for transmon qubits, aiming to provide a unified, accessible framework that integrates physical intuition for pulse design, analytical understanding of gate-level descriptions, and practical considerations of hardware. This article further aims to serve as a guide for students and early researchers entering superconducting quantum computing. We begin by examining simple pulse envelopes and their spectral properties, highlighting how finite bandwidth leads to leakage outside the computational subspace. These observations motivate the introduction of the derivative removal by adiabatic gate (DRAG) technique, which uses a quadrature component proportional to the pulse's time derivative to suppress off-resonant excitations. We analyze the single-qubit case using the Magnus expansion, which provides a clear understanding of the order-by-order introduction of error channels. We discuss the practical hardware realities of control pulse generation, focusing on arbitrary waveform generators (AWG), local oscillators (LO), and IQ mixing. Common imperfections are discussed in terms of their impact on the effective pulse shape and qubit Hamiltonian. Finally, we extend the discussion to two-qubit operations, focusing on the cross-resonance gate and the emergence of effective interactions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导量子比特的高保真度控制需要精心设计的、考虑多种误差通道的微波脉冲。本工作对transmon量子比特的脉冲整形技术进行了教学性介绍，旨在提供一个统一且易于理解的框架，该框架整合了脉冲设计的物理直觉、门级描述的解析理解以及硬件的实际考量。本文旨在为进入超导量子计算领域的学生和早期研究者提供指南。我们首先考察简单的脉冲包络及其频谱特性，强调有限带宽如何导致向计算子空间外的泄漏。这些观察促使我们引入绝热门导数去除技术，该技术利用与脉冲时间导数成正比的 quadrature 分量来抑制非共振激发。我们使用Magnus展开分析单量子比特情况，该展开清晰提供了误差通道逐级引入的理解。我们讨论了控制脉冲生成的实际硬件现实，重点介绍任意波形发生器、本地振荡器和IQ混频。常见的非理想性根据其对有效脉冲形状和量子比特哈密顿量的影响进行讨论。最后，我们将讨论扩展到双量子比特操作，重点关注交叉共振门和有效相互作用的产生。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Animesh Patra et al. |
| 5 | **[Superconductivity induced by altermagnetic spin fluctuations in high-pressure MnB$_4$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21561v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent experiments found superconductivity in nonmagnetic MnB$_4$ with a high critical temperature ($T_{c}$) reaching 14 K at 158 GPa. However, ab initio calculations of the electron-phonon coupling predict a $T_{c}$ below 1 K, suggesting that a conventional mechanism cannot explain this phenomenon. In this Letter, we find that MnB$_4$ is close to an altermagnetic instability in density-functional theory calculations. We propose that the superconductivity is driven by altermagnetic spin fluctuations. To verify the pairing symmetry, we have constructed a two-orbital tight-binding model, where boron states at the Fermi level are integrated out. Using this model, we identify an extended-$s$ symmetry as the leading pairing instability. If confirmed, this will be the first reported case of superconductivity driven by altermagnetic spin fluctuations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期实验发现非磁性MnB$_4$在158 GPa下具有高达14 K的超导临界温度。然而，电声耦合的第一性原理计算预测其$T_{c}$低于1 K，表明常规机制无法解释这一现象。在本快报中，我们发现密度泛函理论计算中MnB$_4$接近交错磁不稳定性。我们提出超导是由交错磁自旋涨落驱动的。为验证配对对称性，我们构建了一个双轨道紧束缚模型，其中费米能级处的硼态被积分掉。利用该模型，我们确定扩展-$s$对称性是主导的配对不稳定性。如果得到证实，这将是首个报道的交错磁自旋涨落驱动超导的案例。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Danylo Radevych et al. |
| 6 | **[Pairing mechanism and superconductivity in 1313 phase La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21533v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recently, the observation of superconductivity (SC) with $T_c$ $\approx$ 3.6 K in the pressurized 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ has attracted considerable interest. Here, we systematically investigate the electronic properties and superconducting mechanism of 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ using density functional theory plus dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT) and random phase approximation (RPA). Our DFT+DMFT calculations reveal that the single-layer (SL) subsystem exhibits nearly insulating behavior, with the $d_{z^2}$ orbital showing Mott physics, while the trilayer (TL) subsystem remains metallic. This indicates that SC primarily resides in the TL subsystem, whose Ni-$e_g$ orbitals are found to be hole-doped relative to bulk La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$. Based on DFT+DMFT-derived low-energy Hamiltonian, RPA-based analysis yields an $s^{\pm}$-wave pairing symmetry within the TL subsystem. Importantly, we identify two key factors that contribute to the significant suppression of $T_c$ in 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ compared to bulk La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$. First, the hole doping in the TL subsystem, as established by DMFT, leads to a decreased pairing strength, as confirmed by RPA calculations -- a trend resembling that in bulk La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$. Second, the SL subsystem acts as a bridge connecting adjacent superconducting TL subsystems, thereby forming an S-N-S Josephson junction. The resulting interlayer Josephson coupling governs the phase coherence between TL subsystems and further suppresses the global $T_c$. Combinedly, our findings suggest that the high-$T_c$ phase in the RP La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ family should be attributed to the 2222 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ rather than the 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期，在高压下1313相La₃Ni₂O₇中观察到超导电性（SC），其临界温度T_c≈3.6 K，引起了广泛关注。本文利用密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）以及随机相位近似（RPA），系统研究了1313相La₃Ni₂O₇的电子性质与超导机制。我们的DFT+DMFT计算揭示，单层（SL）子体系呈现近绝缘行为，其中d_{z²}轨道表现出莫特物理特征，而三层（TL）子体系则保持金属性。这表明超导电性主要存在于TL子体系中，且相对于块体La₄Ni₃O₁₀，其Ni-e_g轨道被空穴掺杂。基于DFT+DMFT导出的低能哈密顿量，采用RPA分析得到TL子体系内具有s^{±}波配对对称性。重要的是，我们识别出导致1313相La₃Ni₂O₇的T_c相较于块体La₄Ni₃O₁₀显著降低的两个关键因素。首先，DMFT所确定的TL子体系中的空穴掺杂导致配对强度减弱，这一点已由RPA计算证实——该趋势与块体La₄Ni₃O₁₀中的情况类似。其次，SL子体系充当了连接相邻超导TL子体系的桥梁，从而形成S-N-S约瑟夫森结。由此产生的层间约瑟夫森耦合控制了TL子体系之间的相位相干性，并进一步抑制了全局T_c。综合而言，我们的研究结果表明，RP相La₃Ni₂O₇家族中的高温超导相应归因于2222相La₃Ni₂O₇，而非1313相La₃Ni₂O₇。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Cui-Qun Chen et al. |
| 7 | **[Intertwined charge density wave, tunable anti-dome superconductivity, and topological states in kagome metal VSn](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21488v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>These years, kagome materials with 1:1 stoichiometry have garnered increasing attention, among which FeSn, CoSn, and FeGe have been the focus of current studies. However, all of them are antiferromagnetic, thereby hindering the observation of superconductivity and other novel physical properties. Here, we predict a novel 1:1 kagome metal VSn, which is an intrinsic charge density wave (CDW) material. Interestingly, with increasing pressure or doping concentration, the CDW order is progressively suppressed, followed by the emergence of superconductivity characterized by a non-monotonic transition temperature that exhibits a rare anti-dome-shaped dependence. Above a critical threshold, a reentrance of the CDW phase occurs. The anti-dome superconductivity originates from the first hardening and then softening of phonon modes, together with band reconstruction. Crucially, VSn retains nontrivial topological properties across the entire superconducting regime, a feature of paramount importance for realizing robust topological superconductivity. These intertwined CDW, superconductivity, and topological phenomena elucidate the correlations among multiple quantum states in VSn. Therefore, this research paves the way for for designing 1:1 kagome superconducting topological metals and establishes a platform for exploring the interplay of multiple phases in kagome systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近年来，具有1:1化学计量比的kagome材料日益受到关注，其中FeSn、CoSn和FeGe是当前研究的焦点。然而，它们均为反铁磁体，从而阻碍了对超导电性及其他新奇物理性质的观测。在此，我们预测了一种新型1:1 kagome金属VSn，它是一种本征电荷密度波（CDW）材料。有趣的是，随着压力或掺杂浓度的增加，CDW有序被逐步抑制，随后出现超导电性，其特征转变温度呈现罕见的反穹顶状非单调依赖关系。超过某一临界阈值后，CDW相会重新进入。反穹顶状超导电性源于声子模式先硬化后软化，以及能带重构。至关重要的是，VSn在整个超导区域都保留了非平庸的拓扑性质，这一特征对于实现稳健的拓扑超导电性至关重要。这些相互交织的CDW、超导和拓扑现象阐明了VSn中多种量子态之间的关联。因此，本研究为设计1:1 kagome超导拓扑金属铺平了道路，并为探索kagome体系中多相相互作用建立了平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Shu-Xiang Qiao et al. |
| 8 | **[HEOM-in-Calibration-Loop: Exposing Non-Markovian Bath Signatures That Markovian Calibration Elides in Superconducting-Qubit Tune-Up](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21458v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Closed-loop superconducting-qubit calibration has matured into DAG-orchestrated protocol chains, yet published frameworks treat the bath via a Markovian master equation or a phenomenological likelihood, absorbing bath structure into fit residuals instead of reporting it as a diagnostic. We integrate a QuTiP 5.x hierarchical-equations-of-motion (HEOM) solver driven by a Tier-1 1/f Burkard bath into a multi-protocol calibration DAG (Rabi -> {Ramsey || T1}) and benchmark it against sesolve and mesolve on a frozen platform in a pulse-level simulator (no hardware validation). The Ramsey channel carries the headline: the Markovian fit is censored by its exponential-family numerical ceiling, while HEOM recovers a physical revival envelope whose primary T2* separates from the Markovian reference by at least 13x at 95% independent-bootstrap confidence within the HEOM-feasible budget; the point-estimate ratio reaches >=28x on the 50-point primary-t1 grid and ~72x on the 30-point biexp-family tau_aw pivot at L=5. Rabi contrast falls 2.17% below mesolve on a noise-limited 30-point grid; the paired-bootstrap CI crosses zero, so this channel corroborates rather than independently establishes the non-Markovian signature. T1 decay shape matches across backends (beta=1.000), yet HEOM's initial occupation drops from 1.000 to 0.879 -- a bath-dressed contamination stable under a 16-point densification. The DAG adds 9.62 us average per-protocol scheduling overhead, no meaningful latency penalty at protocol granularity. HEOM-in-loop thereby changes what calibration reports: bath structure appears as a quantifiable residual rather than a hidden confound.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>闭环超导量子比特校准已发展为有向无环图（DAG）编排的协议链，然而现有框架通过马尔可夫主方程或现象学似然函数处理环境，将环境结构吸收到拟合残差中，而非将其作为诊断信息报告。我们将一个由一级1/f Burkard环境驱动的QuTiP 5.x层次运动方程（HEOM）求解器集成到一个多协议校准DAG（Rabi -> {Ramsey || T1}）中，并在脉冲级模拟器（无硬件验证）的冻结平台上，将其与sesolve和mesolve进行基准测试。Ramsey通道承载了核心结论：马尔可夫拟合因其指数族数值上限而被截断，而HEOM则恢复了一个物理的复兴包络线，在HEOM可行的计算预算内，其主T2*在95%独立自助置信度下与马尔可夫参考值至少相差13倍；在50点主t1网格上，点估计比率达到≥28倍，在L=5时，30点双指数族tau_aw枢轴上达到约72倍。在噪声受限的30点网格上，Rabi对比度比mesolve低2.17%；配对自助置信区间跨越零，因此该通道是佐证而非独立确立非马尔可夫特征。T1衰减形状在各后端之间匹配（beta=1.000），但HEOM的初始占据数从1.000降至0.879——这是一种环境修饰的污染，在16点加密下保持稳定。该DAG每个协议平均增加9.62微秒的调度开销，在协议粒度下无显著延迟惩罚。因此，引入HEOM的循环改变了校准报告的内容：环境结构作为可量化的残差出现，而非隐藏的混杂因素。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Jun Ye et al. |
| 9 | **[PAEMS: Precise and Adaptive Error Model for Superconducting Quantum Processors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29439v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting quantum processor units (QPUs) are incapable of producing massive datasets for quantum error correction (QEC) because of hardware limitations. Thus, QEC decoders heavily depend on synthetic data from qubit error models. Classic depolarizing error models with polynomial complexity present limited accuracy. Coherent density matrix methods suffer from exponential complexity $\propto O(4^n)$ where $n$ represents the number of qubits. This paper introduces PAEMS: a precise and adaptive qubit error model. Its qubit-wise separation framework, incorporating leakage propagation, captures error evolvements crossing spatial and temporal domains. Utilizing repetition-code experiment datasets, PAEMS effectively identifies the intrinsic qubit errors through an end-to-end optimization pipeline. Experiments on IBM's QPUs have demonstrated a 19.5$\times$, 9.3$\times$, and 5.2$\times$ reduction in timelike, spacelike, and spacetime error correlation, respectively, surpassing all of the previous works. It also outperforms the accuracy of Google's SI1000 error model by 58$\sim$73\% on multiple quantum platforms, including IBM's Brisbane, Sherbrooke, and Torino, as well as China Mobile's Wuyue and QuantumCTek's Tianyan.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导量子处理器单元（QPU）由于硬件限制，无法产生用于量子纠错（QEC）的大规模数据集。因此，QEC解码器严重依赖于来自量子比特误差模型的合成数据。具有多项式复杂度的经典去极化误差模型精度有限。相干密度矩阵方法则面临指数复杂度∝ O(4^n)的问题，其中n代表量子比特数。本文介绍了PAEMS：一种精确且自适应的量子比特误差模型。其基于量子比特分离的框架，结合了泄漏传播，能够捕捉跨越空间和时间域的误差演化。利用重复码实验数据集，PAEMS通过端到端优化流程有效识别了本征量子比特误差。在IBM的QPU上的实验表明，时间类、空间类和时空类误差相关性分别降低了19.5倍、9.3倍和5.2倍，超越了所有先前的工作。在多个量子平台上，包括IBM的Brisbane、Sherbrooke和Torino，以及中国移动的吴岳和量子CTek的天衍，其精度也超越了Google的SI1000误差模型58%至73%。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Songhuan He et al. |
| 10 | **[Benchmarking Quantum Computers via Protocols, Comparing Superconducting and Ion-Trap Quantum Technology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27397v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Both Superconducting and Ion-Trap are leading quantum architectures common in the current landscape of the quantum computing field, each with distinct characteristics and operational constraints. Understanding and measuring the underlying quantumness of these devices is essential for assessing their readiness for practical applications and guiding future progress and research. Building on earlier work (Meirom, Mor, Weinstein Arxiv 2505.12441), we utilize a benchmarking strategy applicable for comparing these two architectures by measuring "quantumness" directly on optimal sub-chips. Distinct from existing metrics, our approach employs rigorous binary fidelity thresholds derived from the classical limits of state transfer. This enables us to definitively establish quantum advantage of a designated sub-region. Here we apply this quality assurance methodology to platforms from both technologies. This comparison provides a protocol-based evaluation of quantumness advantage, revealing not only the strengths and weaknesses of each tested chip and its sub-chips but also offering a common language for their assessment. By abstracting away technical differences in the final result, we demonstrate a benchmarking strategy that bridges the gap between disparate quantum-circuit technologies, enabling fair performance comparisons and establishing a critical foundation for evaluating future claims of quantum advantage. This work was made possible by policies of two companies who enable independent and objective assessment on their quantum computers and sub-chips. In the name of science, we encourage other companies to emulate the independent qubit availability and the fair pricing which allow researchers to preform such assessments.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导和离子阱是当前量子计算领域常见的两种领先量子架构，各自具有独特的特性和操作约束。理解和测量这些器件的底层量子性，对于评估其实际应用就绪度以及指导未来进展和研究至关重要。基于先前工作（Meirom, Mor, Weinstein Arxiv 2505.12441），我们采用一种适用于比较这两种架构的基准测试策略，通过直接在最优子芯片上测量“量子性”来进行比较。与现有指标不同，我们的方法采用了源自态转移经典极限的严格二进制保真度阈值。这使我们能够明确确定指定子区域的量子优势。在此，我们将这种质量保证方法应用于来自两种技术的平台。这种比较提供了一种基于协议的量子性优势评估，不仅揭示了每个被测芯片及其子芯片的优势和劣势，还为其评估提供了一种通用语言。通过在最终结果中抽象掉技术差异，我们展示了一种弥合不同量子电路技术之间差距的基准测试策略，从而能够进行公平的性能比较，并为评估未来量子优势的声明奠定关键基础。这项工作的实现得益于两家公司的政策，它们允许对其量子计算机和子芯片进行独立客观的评估。以科学的名义，我们鼓励其他公司效仿这种独立的量子比特可用性和公平定价，使研究人员能够进行此类评估。</p></details> | 2026-04-23 | Nitay Mayo et al. |
| 11 | **[Stabilization of a non-superconducting, orthorhombic phase by over-hydrogenating LaFeSiH](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20716v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Chemical composition provides a powerful route to tune the electronic ground state of iron-based superconductors and other quantum materials, yet access to highly doped phases remains limited. Here we demonstrate that high-pressure thermal decomposition of hydrogen-rich precursors enables over-hydrogenation of LaFeSi. Using anthracene, we synthesize tetragonal superconducting LaFeSiH, including a single hydrogen site, while ammonia borane yields a structurally distorted over-hydrogenated phase, LaFeSiH1+x, with an orthorhombic structure. Chemical analysis reveal excess hydrogen (x ~ 0.6), implying a second H site in LaFeSiH1.6 whose localization and occupancy are determined by neutron diffraction. In contrast to metallic LaFeSi and superconducting LaFeSiH, orthorhombic LaFeSiH1.6 exhibits semiconductor-like behavior. Upon hydrogen release near 100 °C, it transforms into tetragonal superconducting LaFeSiH1+δ (δ << 0.6). These results establish the chemical flexibility of the layered LaFeSiX (X = H, O, F) family and provide access to a high hydrogen-doping regime, creating new opportunities to investigate superconductivity in Fe-based silicides.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>化学成分调控为铁基超导体及其他量子材料电子基态的调节提供了有效途径，然而高掺杂相的可及性仍然受限。本文证明，富氢前驱体的高压热分解可实现LaFeSi的过氢化。使用蒽作为前驱体，我们合成了包含单一氢位点的四方相超导LaFeSiH；而氨硼烷则产生结构畸变的过氢化相LaFeSiH₁₊ₓ，具有正交结构。化学分析显示过量氢含量（x~0.6），表明LaFeSiH₁.₆中存在第二个氢位点，其中子衍射确定了该位点的局域化特征与占据率。与金属性LaFeSi及超导LaFeSiH不同，正交相LaFeSiH₁.₆呈现类半导体行为。当温度接近100°C时释放氢后，该相转变为四方相超导LaFeSiH₁₊δ（δ<<0.6）。这些结果确立了层状LaFeSiX（X=H,O,F）家族的化学可调性，并提供了进入高氢掺杂区的途径，为铁基硅化物超导电性研究创造了新机遇。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | M. F. Hansen et al. |
| 12 | **[Superconductivity in bilayer La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$: A review focusing on the strong-coupling Hund's rule assisted pairing mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20613v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Discovery of high-$T_c$ superconductivity (SC) in the bilayer nickelate series La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ have attracted substantial interest, providing a new platform for exploring unconventional SC. Certain experimental evidence has pointed to a correlated electronic nature, which is the driving force responsible for its high critical temperature ($T_c$). This work reviews the SC in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, with a particular focus on theoretical understanding of its pairing mechanism driven by this strong-coupling, Hund-assisted scenario. The electronic landscape is governed by two $E_g$-orbitals within the bilayer structure of NiO$_2$ planes. The $3d_{z^2}$ orbital is nearly half-filled and exhibits a stronger localized character, while the $3d_{x^2-y^2}$ is approximately quarter-filled and remains highly itinerant. The localized $3d_{z^2}$ orbitals experience robust interlayer hybridization, mediated by the $2p_z$ orbitals of the inner apical oxygen atoms. This hybridization generates a strong interlayer antiferromagnetic (AFM) exchange. In the strong coupling regime, Hund's rule coupling aligns the spins of the two $E_g$ orbitals on the same nickel site. The strong interlayer AFM exchange is effectively transferred to the itinerant $3d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital, generating an effective coupling $J_{\perp}$ within this orbital. This mechanism is captured by a minimal strong-coupling bilayer $t$-$J$-$J_{\perp}$ model for the $3d_{x^2-y^2}$ band. Driven by $J_{\perp}$, $3d_{x^2-y^2}$ electrons can form interlayer Cooper pairs, leading to an extended $s$-wave pairing SC with high $T_c$. Meanwhile, the strongly localized $3d_{z^2}$ electrons tend to form interlayer rung singlets. Due to a lack of phase coherence, these singlets do not directly participate in the SC condensate, but instead give rise to a pseudogap phase.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>双层镍酸盐系列La₃Ni₂O₇中高温超导的发现引发了广泛关注，为探索非常规超导提供了新平台。部分实验证据指向关联电子特性，这正是其高临界温度（Tc）的驱动力。本文综述了La₃Ni₂O₇的超导电性，重点聚焦于该强耦合、洪德辅助机制驱动配对的理论理解。其电子态由NiO₂双层结构中的两个Eg轨道主导：3dz²轨道近乎半填充且呈现较强局域性，而3dx²-y²轨道约为四分之一填充且保持高度巡游性。局域化的3dz²轨道通过内顶角氧原子的2pz轨道实现强层间杂化，该杂化产生强层间反铁磁交换作用。在强耦合体系中，洪德耦合使同一镍位点上的两个Eg轨道自旋对齐，强层间反铁磁交换有效传递至巡游性3dx²-y²轨道，在该轨道内产生有效耦合J⊥。该机制可通过针对3dx²-y²能带的最小强耦合双层t-J-J⊥模型描述。在J⊥驱动下，3dx²-y²电子可形成层间库珀对，导致具有高Tc的扩展s波配对超导。同时，强局域化的3dz²电子倾向于形成层间梯子单态。由于缺乏相位相干性，这些单态不直接参与超导凝聚，而是产生赝能隙相。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Zhiming Pan et al. |
| 13 | **[Discovery of parity-violating chiral polar-nematic charge density wave and superconductivity in kagome metals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20546v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Nonmagnetic kagome metals and superconductors AV3Sb5 (A = K, Rb, Cs) host unconventional charge density wave (CDW) and superconducting (SC) phases accompanied by multiple electronic symmetry breaking. Due to the centrosymmetric crystal structure, inversion symmetry has generally been assumed to hold. Here, using scanning tunneling microscopy complemented by atomic force microscopy and optical second-harmonic generation, we directly reveal that inversion symmetry in the kagome plane is spontaneously broken in the CDW state. The mixed-parity CDW state exhibits ferroelectric dipolar and nematic quadrupolar ordered moments. The coexistence and coupling between the dipole and quadrupole favor noncollinear ferro-polar and nematic alignment that breaks all mirror symmetries and gives rise to robust electronic chirality in the 3Q CDW. The multipolar coupling to in-plane electric field enables electric field control and manipulation of the chiral polar-nematic CDW state, including its chirality. Below the SC transition, we observe parity-violating pair density modulations at both the original and the CDW lattice wavevectors. Our findings of parity-violating electronic chiral multipolar order provide microscopic insights into the magnetoelectric and nonreciprocal transport, loop current order, pairing density waves, and unconventional superconductivity in kagome metals and related quantum materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非磁性笼目金属及超导体AV₃Sb₅（A=K,Rb,Cs）承载着伴随多重电子对称性破缺的非常规电荷密度波与超导相。由于晶体结构中心对称，通常认为反演对称性保持成立。本文利用扫描隧道显微镜辅以原子力显微镜和光学二次谐波产生，直接揭示了笼目平面内的反演对称性在CDW态中自发破缺。混合宇称CDW态呈现铁电偶极和向列四极有序矩。偶极与四极的共存与耦合有利于非共线铁电极化-向列排列，该排列打破所有镜面对称性，并在3Q CDW中产生稳健的电子手性。多极耦合至面内电场可实现电场调控与操纵手性极化-向列CDW态（包括其手性）。在超导转变温度以下，我们观察到在原始晶格波矢和CDW晶格波矢处均存在宇称破缺的配对密度调制。本文发现的宇称破缺电子手性多极序为笼目金属及相关量子材料中的磁电与非互易输运、环电流序、配对密度波以及非常规超导电性提供了微观见解。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Xingwei Shi et al. |
| 14 | **[Multimode Purcell Filter for Superconducting-Qubit Reset and Readout with Intrinsic Purcell Protection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.04676v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Efficient qubit reset and leakage reduction are essential for scalable superconducting quantum computing, particularly in the context of quantum error correction. However, such operations often require additional on-chip components. Here, we propose and experimentally demonstrate a hardware-efficient approach to qubit reset and readout using a multi-mode Purcell filter in a superconducting quantum circuit. We exploit the inherent multi-mode structure of a coplanar waveguide resonator, using its fundamental and second-order modes for qubit reset and readout, respectively, thereby avoiding additional components. Implemented in a flip-chip architecture, our device achieves unconditional reset with residual excitation below 1\% in 220 ns, and a leakage reduction unit that selectively resets the second excited state within 62 ns with a residual $|f\rangle$ population of 6.1\%, accounting for the readout error. Despite the qubits being directly coupled to the filter in our configuration, the measured relaxation times are not degraded owing to intrinsic Purcell protection provided by an auxiliary mode. To our knowledge, this is the first experimental trial that exploits different-order modes of a microwave resonator for distinct qubit operations, representing a new direction toward scalable, hardware-efficient quantum processor design.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>高效量子比特复位和泄漏抑制对于可扩展超导量子计算至关重要，特别是在量子纠错背景下。然而，此类操作通常需要额外的片上组件。本文提出并实验演示了一种利用超导量子电路中多模珀塞尔滤波器的硬件高效型量子比特复位与读取方案。我们利用共面波导谐振器固有的多模结构，分别使用其基模和二阶模进行量子比特复位和读取，从而避免额外组件。采用倒装芯片架构实现的器件在220纳秒内实现无条件复位，残余激发低于1%，并实现泄漏抑制单元，可在62纳秒内选择性复位第二激发态，残余|f⟩布居数为6.1%（已考虑读取误差）。尽管在我们的配置中量子比特直接耦合至滤波器，但由于辅助模式提供的固有珀塞尔保护，测量的弛豫时间并未退化。据我们所知，这是首次利用微波谐振器不同阶模式实现不同量子比特操作的实验尝试，代表了迈向可扩展、硬件高效型量子处理器设计的新方向。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Xu-Yang Gu et al. |
| 15 | **[Perfect spin nonreciprocity in gated superconducting altermagnetic heterostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20312v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We consider a superconducting altermagnet heterostructure and demonstrate that the interplay between altermagnetism and a selective filter of transverse momentum channels enables perfect nonreciprocal spin-polarized currents. We demonstrate that this nonreciprocity manifests in both local and nonlocal spin currents, signalling the emergence of directionally selective local and nonlocal spin behaviors. We show that the selective filter of transverse momentum channels is realized by gating a finite normal region between the superconducting altermagnet and the metallic reservoir, which then directionally selects transport channels that match the momentum-dependent spin-split superconducting altermagnetic states, allowing for nonreciprocal spin-polarized currents. We discover that the local and nonlocal spin nonreciprocity features a highly tunable polarity and nearly perfect quality factors, respectively, which is achieved by means of gate voltages and by varying the length of the finite region. Moreover, we find that local and nonlocal charge currents also develop a nonreciprocal behavior, whose quality factors can also reach perfect values. In all cases, the spin and charge currents are sensitive to variations of the altermagnetic field, a functional dependence that can be exploited to identify the type of altermagnetism. Our findings put forward an electrically controllable route towards nonreciprocal superconducting spintronic devices based on altermagnets.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们考虑超导交变磁体异质结构，并证明交变磁性与横向动量通道选择性滤波器的协同作用可实现完美非互易自旋极化电流。我们证明这种非互易性同时体现在局域和非局域自旋电流中，标志着方向选择性局域与非局域自旋行为的出现。研究表明，横向动量通道选择性滤波器通过在超导交变磁体与金属库之间对有限正常区域施加栅压实现，该滤波器方向性地选择与动量依赖自旋分裂超导交变磁态匹配的输运通道，从而产生非互易自旋极化电流。我们发现局域和非局域自旋非互易性分别具有高度可调极性和近乎完美的品质因子，这可通过栅极电压和改变有限区域长度实现。此外，我们发现局域和非局域电荷电流也呈现非互易行为，其品质因子同样可达完美值。在所有情况下，自旋和电荷电流对交变磁场变化均敏感，这种函数依赖关系可用于识别交变磁性类型。我们的研究结果为基于交变磁体的非互易超导自旋电子器件提供了电学可控路径。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Pei-Hao Fu et al. |
| 16 | **[Observation of field-odd and field-free superconducting diode effects in $\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$ nanoflakes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19525v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE) enables nonreciprocal supercurrent flow, holding immense potential for ultra-low-power quantum electronics. Intrinsic SDE typically requires materials with inherent symmetry breakings. Here, we report the discovery of SDE in chemical vapor deposition-grown molybdenum carbide ($\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$) nanoflakes, a material traditionally considered centrosymmetric. Strikingly, this system uniquely hosts both field-odd and field-free SDEs. Transport measurements reveal a field-odd SDE with tunable efficiency exceeding 40% at 4 K under a perpendicular in-plane magnetic field. In a separate sample, a robust field-free SDE persists under zero-field and field-coolings. Out-of-plane field sweeps confirm the intrinsic nature of these phenomena. We propose that domain-boundary supercurrents or charge density wave-like orders drive this unexpected combination of symmetry breakings. Our findings establish air-stable $\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$ as an ideal platform for nonreciprocal superconducting electronics operating at liquid-helium temperatures, expanding the search for SDE into nominally centrosymmetric superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应(SDE)可实现非互易超导电流，在超低功耗量子电子学中具有巨大潜力。本征SDE通常需要具有固有对称性破缺的材料。本文报道了在化学气相沉积生长的碳化钼($\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$)纳米薄片中发现的SDE，该材料传统上被认为是中心对称的。引人注目的是，该系统独特地同时存在场奇SDE和无场SDE。输运测量揭示了在面内垂直磁场下，4 K时场奇SDE的可调效率超过40%。在另一独立样品中，稳健的无场SDE在零场和场冷却条件下持续存在。面外磁场扫描证实了这些现象的本征特性。我们提出，畴边界超电流或电荷密度波序驱动了这种意想不到的对称性破缺组合。我们的研究确立了空气稳定的$\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$作为在液氦温度下运行的非互易超导电子学的理想平台，并将SDE的探索扩展至名义上的中心对称超导体。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Wei Gao et al. |
| 17 | **[Bulk superconductivity up to 96 K in pressurized nickelate single crystals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.14584v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recently, the Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer nickelate $La_3Ni_2O_7$ has emerged as a superconductor with a transition temperature ($T_c$) of approximately 80 K above 14 GPa (Refs. 1-3). Achieving higher $T_c$ in nickelate superconductors, along with the synthesis of reproducible high-quality single crystals without relying on high-oxygen-pressure growth conditions, remains a significant challenge$^{[4-7]}$. Here we report superconductivity up to 96 K under high pressure in bilayer nickelate single crystals synthesized at ambient pressure. Energy-dispersive spectroscopy, single-crystal X-ray diffraction, nuclear quadrupole resonance and scanning transmission electron microscopy evidenced high crystal quality of the flux-grown $La_2SmNi_2O_{7-δ}$ single crystals. $La_2SmNi_2O_7$ exhibits clear bulk superconductivity, including zero resistivity ($T_{c,max}^{onset}$ = 92 K and $T_{c,max}^{zero}$ = 73 K at 21.6 GPa) and the Meissner effect ($T_c$= 60 K at 20.6 GPa). A low-temperature high-pressure structural study indicates that both monoclinic and tetragonal structures can support superconductivity in this bilayer nickelate. Furthermore, we established a correlation between higher $T_c$ under high pressures and larger in-plane lattice distortion under ambient conditions, corroborated by observing even higher $T_c^{onset}$ of 96 K in $La_{1.57}Sm_{1.43}Ni_2O_{7-δ}$. This study overcomes key limitations in growing nickelate superconductor crystals, resolves the crystal structure in the superconducting state and demonstrates an effective pathway towards achieving higher $T_c$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期，Ruddlesden-Popper双层镍酸盐$La_3Ni_2O_7$作为一种超导体出现，其在14 GPa以上具有约80 K的转变温度($T_c$)(参考文献1-3)。在镍酸盐超导体中实现更高的$T_c$，以及在不依赖高氧压生长条件的情况下合成可重复的高质量单晶，仍然是一个重大挑战$^{[4-7]}$。本文报道了在常压下合成的双层镍酸盐单晶中，高压下高达96 K的超导电性。能量色散谱、单晶X射线衍射、核四极共振和扫描透射电子显微镜证实了助熔剂法生长的$La_2SmNi_2O_{7-δ}$单晶具有高质量晶体结构。$La_2SmNi_2O_7$表现出明确的体超导电性，包括零电阻($T_{c,max}^{onset}$ = 92 K，$T_{c,max}^{zero}$ = 73 K，21.6 GPa下)和迈斯纳效应($T_c$= 60 K，20.6 GPa下)。低温高压结构研究表明，单斜和四方结构均能支持该双层镍酸盐的超导电性。此外，我们建立了高压下更高$T_c$与常压下更大面内晶格畸变之间的关联，并在$La_{1.57}Sm_{1.43}Ni_2O_{7-δ}$中观察到高达96 K的$T_c^{onset}$进一步证实了这一点。本研究克服了生长镍酸盐超导体晶体的关键限制，解析了超导态的晶体结构，并展示了一条实现更高$T_c$的有效途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Feiyu Li et al. |
| 18 | **[Competing Constraints on Superconductivity in Thick FeSe films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19443v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting films emerge from the complex interplay of multiple growth parameters, making their optimization challenging. In iron-based superconductors, compressive strain is known to enhance the transition temperature (Tc) of FeSe films, yet reported Tc values vary widely even on identical substrates, indicating factors beyond strain are critical. Here, we develop a high-throughput off-center pulsed laser deposition strategy that transforms plume inhomogeneity into combinatorial FeSe film libraries with continuous gradients in lattice parameter, composition, and disorder. We discover that the maximum Tc does not coincide with the plume center but can shift off-center, revealing a competition between favorable c-axis expansion, stoichiometry, and defect scattering. Systematic characterization of 80 thick films (>50 nm), combined with interpretable machine learning, shows that besides the strong correlate of c-axis lattice parameter to Tc, the stoichiometry and disorder scattering impose critical constraints on the achievable transition temperature, defining a narrow optimization window rather than a simple monotonic relationship. This framework yields Tconset=17.1 K in thick FeSe films and establishes a general framework combining combinatorial synthesis with machine learning to uncover constrained optimization landscapes in complex functional materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导薄膜的形成源于多个生长参数之间复杂的相互作用，使其优化具有挑战性。在铁基超导体中，压应变已知可提高FeSe薄膜的转变温度(Tc)，但即使在相同衬底上，报道的Tc值也存在很大差异，这表明应变之外的因素至关重要。本文开发了一种高通量偏心脉冲激光沉积策略，将羽辉不均匀性转化为具有连续梯度变化的晶格参数、成分和无序度的组合FeSe薄膜库。我们发现最大Tc并不出现在羽辉中心，而是可能偏移至偏心位置，揭示了有利的c轴膨胀、化学计量比和缺陷散射之间的竞争。对80个厚膜(>50 nm)的系统表征，结合可解释的机器学习表明，除了c轴晶格参数与Tc的强相关性外，化学计量比和无序散射对可实现的转变温度施加了关键限制，定义了一个狭窄的优化窗口，而非简单的单调关系。该框架在厚FeSe薄膜中实现了Tconset=17.1 K，并建立了一个将组合合成与机器学习相结合的通用框架，以揭示复杂功能材料中的约束优化图景。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Ya-Xun He et al. |
| 19 | **[Superconducting properties of the three-dimensional Hofstadter-Hubbard model below the critical flux for Weyl points](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19332v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The three-dimensional Hofstadter model exhibits a critical rational flux at which Weyl points emerge in the single-particle spectrum. We study the superconducting regime of the model in the presence of a Hubbard attractive interaction by tuning the magnetic flux across its critical value. We determine the phase diagram in the plane of the coprime pairs parametrizing the magnetic flux. We show that the system exhibits two distinct regimes separated by a critical flux $Φ_c$: for $Φ>Φ_c$, a semimetal-to-superconductor quantum phase transition occurs at a finite interaction strength ($U_c\neq0$), while for $Φ<Φ_c$ superconductivity arises for arbitrarily weak attraction, with a BCS-like exponential scaling of the gap due to the finiteness of the density of states. Close to the transition, we study the scaling behavior and identify the critical exponents. Our results highlight the interplay between magnetic band topology and attractive pairing in three-dimensional Hofstadter systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>三维Hofstadter模型在单粒子谱中表现出一个临界有理磁通，在此处外尔点出现。我们通过调节磁通穿越其临界值，研究了该模型在存在哈伯德吸引相互作用下的超导区域。我们确定了以参数化磁通的互质对为平面的相图。我们表明系统表现出由临界磁通$Φ_c$分隔的两个不同区域：对于$Φ>Φ_c$，在有限相互作用强度($U_c\neq0$)下发生半金属到超导体的量子相变；而对于$Φ<Φ_c$，超导电性在任意弱吸引下出现，由于态密度的有限性，能隙具有类似BCS的指数标度。在转变附近，我们研究了标度行为并确定了临界指数。我们的结果突出了三维Hofstadter系统中磁能带拓扑与吸引配对之间的相互作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Pierpaolo Fontana et al. |
| 20 | **[Unveiling the Superconducting Ground State of Heusler alloy Pd2ZrIn via muon spin relaxation and rotation measurement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19283v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Full Heusler alloys XInPd2 (X= Zr, Hf and Ti) have recently attracted significant attention owing to their symmetry-driven electronic structure and also due to the interplay between disorder and emergent ground states. Within this family, Pd2ZrIn serves as a unique platform to study the effect of disorder on superconducting pairing. This alloy crystallizes in a cubic L21 structure with significant B2-type antisite disorder. Electrical resistivity and magnetic susceptibility studies confirm bulk type-II superconductivity with a transition temperature TC ~ 2.2 K. Zero-field μSR results reveal no evidence of spontaneous internal magnetic fields below TC, confirming the preservation of time-reversal symmetry. Transverse-field μSR spectra show the formation of a vortex lattice, consistent with type-II superconductivity, and the superfluid density is well described by a fully gapped, nodeless s-wave state with superconducting gap Δ (0) ~ 0.33 \pm 0.01 meV. Furthermore, the estimated ratio of transition temperature and Fermi temperature (TC/TF) indicates that this alloy lies within the conventional superconducting regime on the Uemura plot. These results establish Pd2ZrIn as a weakly coupled, dirty-limit, type-II superconductor; with a fully gapped, nodeless order parameter and preserved time-reversal symmetry.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>全赫斯勒合金XInPd2 (X= Zr, Hf和Ti)近期因其对称性驱动的电子结构以及无序与演生基态之间的相互作用而受到广泛关注。在该家族中，Pd2ZrIn作为研究无序对超导配对影响的独特平台。该合金结晶为立方L21结构，并具有显著的B2型反位无序。电阻率和磁化率研究证实了其体II型超导电性，转变温度TC ~ 2.2 K。零场μSR结果显示在TC以下没有自发内磁场的证据，证实了时间反演对称性的保持。横向场μSR谱显示了涡旋晶格的形成，与II型超导电性一致，并且超流密度可以用一个完全能隙、无节点的s波态很好地描述，其超导能隙Δ (0) ~ 0.33 \pm 0.01 meV。此外，估计的转变温度与费米温度之比(TC/TF)表明，该合金在Uemura图上位于常规超导区域。这些结果确立了Pd2ZrIn是一种弱耦合、脏极限的II型超导体，具有完全能隙、无节点的序参量，并保持了时间反演对称性。</p></details> | 2026-04-21 | Kavita Yadav et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Autonomous Emergence of Hamiltonian in Deep Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20821v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The unprecedented predictive success of deep generative models in complex many-body systems, such as AlphaFold3, raises an epistemological question: do these networks merely memorize data distributions via high-dimensional interpolation, or do they autonomously deduce the underlying physical laws? To address this, we introduce a rigorous algebraic framework to extract the implicit physical interactions learned by generative models. By establishing an exact equivalence between the zero-noise limit of a Riemannian diffusion score field and the thermodynamic restoring force, we utilize the trained neural network as a direct force estimator. Applying this framework to a sequence-dependent, frustrated 1D $O(3)$ spin glass, we probe the latent representations of an $O(3)$-equivariant attention architecture trained solely on thermal equilibrium snapshots. Without incorporating any energetic priors, an overdetermined linear inversion successfully recovers the microscopic Hamiltonian parameters of the spin system. The inferred Hamiltonian parameters exhibit a $99.7\%$ cosine similarity with the ground-truth interaction parameters. Furthermore, these sparse local parameters alone are sufficient to explain $87\%$ of the variance in the continuous force field predicted by the network. Our results provide quantitative, falsifiable evidence that deep generative architectures do not merely perform statistical pattern matching, but autonomously discover and internalize the underlying physical rules.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>深度生成模型在复杂多体系统（如AlphaFold3）中取得了前所未有的预测成功，这引发了一个认识论问题：这些网络仅仅是通过高维插值来记忆数据分布，还是自主推导出了潜在的物理定律？为解决此问题，我们引入了一个严格的代数框架来提取生成模型所学习的隐式物理相互作用。通过建立黎曼扩散得分场零噪声极限与热力学恢复力之间的精确等价关系，我们将训练好的神经网络用作直接的力估计器。将该框架应用于一个序列依赖、受挫的一维$O(3)$自旋玻璃模型，我们探究了一个仅基于热平衡快照训练的$O(3)$等变注意力架构的潜在表征。在不引入任何能量先验的情况下，一个超定线性反演成功恢复了自旋系统的微观哈密顿量参数。推断出的哈密顿量参数与真实相互作用参数的余弦相似度达到$99.7\%$。此外，仅凭这些稀疏的局域参数就能解释网络预测的连续力场中$87\%$的方差。我们的结果提供了定量、可证伪的证据，表明深度生成架构并非仅仅执行统计模式匹配，而是自主发现并内化了潜在的物理规则。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Wenjie Xi et al. |
| 2 | **[Tensor network surrogate models for variational quantum computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20180v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We adopt a two-dimensional tensor-network (TN) ansatz to simulate variational quantum algorithms on two-dimensional qubit architectures, demonstrating its capability to accurately simulate deep circuits through the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) applied to Ising spin-glass problems on heavy-hexagonal and square lattices. For heavy-hexagonal problems with up to three-body interactions, parameters trained on small instances and transferred to systems an order of magnitude larger improve the sampled energy distribution only up to intermediate depths, indicating a fundamental limit of parameter concentration as a transfer strategy. By extending the training itself with TN simulations on larger system sizes, we avoid local minima and obtain lower-energy samples. Analyses of entanglement growth and importance sampling show that the simulation remains classically feasible with moderate bond dimension. We find that parameter concentration also persists on square lattices, albeit at substantially higher computational cost to perform reliable sampling. Overall, our TN framework not only provides an efficient and controlled framework for benchmarking variational quantum algorithms on two-dimensional lattices, but also serves as an effective surrogate model for training variational algorithms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们采用二维张量网络（TN）变分拟设来模拟二维量子比特架构上的变分量子算法，通过将量子近似优化算法（QAOA）应用于重六边形和方形晶格上的伊辛自旋玻璃问题，展示了其精确模拟深度电路的能力。对于包含最多三体相互作用的重六边形问题，在小规模实例上训练并迁移至大一个数量级系统的参数，仅能在中等深度内改善采样能量分布，这表明参数集中化作为一种迁移策略存在根本性局限。通过使用张量网络模拟在更大系统规模上扩展训练本身，我们避免了局部极小值并获得了更低能量的样本。对纠缠增长和重要性采样的分析表明，该模拟在中等键维数下仍保持经典可行性。我们发现参数集中化在方形晶格上同样存在，尽管进行可靠采样的计算成本显著更高。总体而言，我们的张量网络框架不仅为在二维晶格上基准测试变分量子算法提供了高效且可控的框架，同时也作为训练变分算法的有效替代模型。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Ryo Watanabe et al. |
| 3 | **[NaCl-Assisted Growth of Ferroelectric SnSe Nanosheets with Spin Glass-like Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10067v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Two-dimensional (2D) SnSe is an emerging 2D material exhibiting intriguing properties such as ferroelectricity and nonlinear optical response. Here, high-quality single-crystalline SnSe nanosheets were synthesized via NaCl-assisted chemical vapor deposition (CVD) method. The addition of NaCl was found to significantly increase the surface coverage of the nanosheets with less influence on their lateral size. The crystalline structure and composition of as-grown nanosheets were charactered by XRD, Raman spectroscopy, and XPS. Ferroelectric domains in SnSe nanosheets are directly visualized by piezoresponse force microscopy (PFM). The magnetic hysteresis loops of SnSe nanosheets are achieved at 2 K, which indicated their weak ferromagnetism. A spin glass-like behavior was observed below 115K, which is attributed to the presence of SnSe2 impurity. This work further establishes a controllable synthesis route for SnSe nanosheets, thereby paving the way for subsequent investigation of their ferroelectric properties.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>二维（2D）SnSe是一种新兴的二维材料，展现出铁电性和非线性光学响应等引人入胜的特性。本文通过氯化钠辅助化学气相沉积（CVD）方法合成了高质量的单晶SnSe纳米片。研究发现，添加氯化钠能显著提高纳米片的表面覆盖率，而对其横向尺寸影响较小。利用X射线衍射（XRD）、拉曼光谱和X射线光电子能谱（XPS）对生长所得纳米片的晶体结构和组成进行了表征。通过压电力显微镜（PFM）直接观察了SnSe纳米片中的铁电畴。在2K温度下获得了SnSe纳米片的磁滞回线，表明其具有弱铁磁性。在115K以下观察到类似自旋玻璃的行为，这归因于SnSe2杂质的存在。本工作进一步建立了一种可控的SnSe纳米片合成路线，从而为其后续铁电性能的研究铺平了道路。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Huiwen Xu et al. |
| 4 | **[Dynamical magnetism in the disordered cubic lattice material $γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18794v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>$γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$ realizes a disordered simple-cubic spin-$1/2$ lattice in which Co$^{2+}$ ions randomly occupy one third of the sites, placing the system close to the site-percolation threshold for magnetic order. Specific-heat, susceptibility, neutron spin-echo, and muon spin-rotation measurements reveal a broad thermodynamic crossover, short-range magnetic correlations, and persistent fast spin dynamics down to at least 0.1~K, with no evidence for static order or conventional spin-glass freezing. Monte Carlo simulations yield a broad distribution of orphan spins, finite clusters, and an infinite network. The calculated orphan-spin fraction ($\approx 8.8\%$) agrees well with the weakly correlated spin fraction inferred from magnetization ($\approx 8.2\%$). Exact diagonalization of a diluted $S = 1/2$ Heisenberg model captures the broad magnetic specific-heat anomaly and supports the coexistence of weakly and strongly correlated spin environments. These results support a picture in which spin-$1/2$ quantum fluctuations, together with dilution and proximity to the percolation threshold, can support a disorder-driven dynamical state with short-range correlations in three dimensions, distinct from both classical spin glasses and geometrically frustrated quantum spin liquids.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>$γ$-${\rm Ba}_{3}{\rm CoNb}_{2}{\rm O}_{9}$ 实现了一个无序的简单立方自旋-1/2晶格，其中 Co$^{2+}$ 离子随机占据三分之一的格点，使该系统接近磁有序的格点渗流阈值。比热、磁化率、中子自旋回波和μ子自旋旋转测量揭示了一个宽泛的热力学交叉、短程磁关联以及持续到至少 0.1~K 的快速自旋动力学，没有发现静态有序或传统自旋玻璃冻结的证据。蒙特卡洛模拟得到了孤儿自旋、有限团簇和一个无限网络的宽泛分布。计算得到的孤儿自旋比例（$\approx 8.8\%$）与从磁化强度推断出的弱关联自旋比例（$\approx 8.2\%$）吻合良好。对稀释的 $S = 1/2$ 海森堡模型进行精确对角化，再现了宽泛的磁比热异常，并支持弱关联与强关联自旋环境共存。这些结果支持了一种图像，即自旋-1/2量子涨落，连同稀释效应以及接近渗流阈值，可以在三维空间中支撑一种具有短程关联的无序驱动动力学态，该态既不同于经典自旋玻璃，也不同于几何阻挫的量子自旋液体。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Fanjun Xu et al. |
| 5 | **[Searching for emergent spacetime in spin glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.20902v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent work on algebraic formulations of holographic dualities in terms of large $N$ algebras has revealed a deep connection between the properties of the associated spectral functions and the emergence of a semiclassical spacetime and causal horizons therein. One of the main lessons is that, for a radial direction to emerge, the spectral function has to exhibit non-compact support. Furthermore, there exist conjectures upon a possible duality between complex gravitational configurations and glassy systems. The goal of this paper is to combine these ideas by studying many-body quantum-mechanical systems and assess in which parameter regimes they could potentially be holographic. Thus, we compute the spectral functions of three many-body systems with quenched disorder, the SYK model, the $p$-spin model and the SU$(M)$ Heisenberg chain in the large $N$ limit and present results in different parameter regimes. Our main finding is that in the quantum spin glass phase of the SU$(M)$ Heisenberg model, the spectral function develops an exponential tail, similar to the large $q$ limit of SYK. Furthermore, we demonstrate the presence of an infinite family of quasiparticle excitations deep in the spin liquid phase of the $p$-spin model, which could point towards an emergent type I von Neumann algebra. In addition, we demonstrate the presence of an exponential tail in the spectral function for all cases without compact support and conformal symmetry. Motivated by this observation, we prove that no low-energy operator can detect a nontrivial bulk causal structure, if the spectral function has exponentially decaying tails.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期关于全息对偶性代数表述（基于大N代数）的研究揭示了相关谱函数性质与半经典时空及其因果视界涌现之间的深刻联系。一个重要启示是：为使径向维度涌现，谱函数必须具有非紧支撑。此外，存在关于复杂引力构型与玻璃态系统可能对偶性的猜想。本文旨在融合这些思想，通过研究多体量子力学系统并评估其在何种参数范围内可能具有全息性。为此，我们计算了三种具有淬火无序的多体系统（SYK模型、p-自旋模型和大N极限下的SU(M)海森堡链）的谱函数，并展示了不同参数区间的结果。主要发现是：在SU(M)海森堡模型的量子自旋玻璃相中，谱函数会产生指数衰减尾，类似于SYK模型的大q极限。此外，我们证明了在p-自旋模型的自旋液体相深处存在无限族的准粒子激发，这可能指向一类涌现的I型冯·诺依曼代数。另外，我们证明了在所有不具备紧支撑与共形对称性的情况下，谱函数均存在指数衰减尾。基于此观察，我们证明：若谱函数具有指数衰减尾，则任何低能算子都无法探测到非平凡的体因果结构。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Dimitris Saraidaris et al. |
| 6 | **[Replica Theory of Spherical Boltzmann Machine Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17936v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Training in machine learning generally consists in finding one model, whose parameters minimize a data-dependent loss. Yet, empirical work shows that ensemble learning, an approach in which multiple models are sampled, can improve performance. Here, we provide an analytical framework to understand these observations in the case of Boltzmann machines, exploiting a duality between ensemble learning and large deviations of the free energy in spin-glass models. Replica calculations allow us to fully solve the case of spherical Boltzmann machine ensembles, and clarify when ensemble learning improves over standard loss minimization. Our findings are corroborated by numerical simulations on deep networks. Special care is brought to the case of nearly finite-dimensional data, for which we show that replica predictions are valid for arbitrarily large number of data points compared to the (large) embedding dimension.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>机器学习训练通常旨在寻找一个能最小化数据相关损失的模型参数。然而实证研究表明，集成学习（即对多个模型进行采样的方法）能提升性能。本文针对玻尔兹曼机提出一个分析框架，利用集成学习与自旋玻璃模型中自由能大偏差之间的对偶关系来理解这些现象。通过复本计算，我们完整求解了球形玻尔兹曼机集成的情形，并阐明了集成学习在何时优于标准损失最小化方法。我们的发现得到了深度网络数值模拟的验证。针对近似有限维数据的情形，我们特别论证了：当数据点数量相对于（较大的）嵌入维度任意大时，复本预测仍然有效。</p></details> | 2026-04-20 | Thomas Tulinski et al. |
| 7 | **[Demonstrating Real Advantage of Machine-Learning-Enhanced Monte Carlo for Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.19544v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Combinatorial optimization problems are central to both practical applications and the development of optimization methods. While classical and quantum algorithms have been refined over decades, machine learning--assisted approaches are comparatively recent and have not yet consistently outperformed simple, state-of-the-art classical methods. Here, we focus on a class of Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problems, specifically the challenge of finding minimum energy configurations in three-dimensional Ising spin glasses. We use a Global Annealing Monte Carlo algorithm that integrates standard local moves with global moves proposed via machine learning. We show that local moves play a crucial role in achieving optimal performance. Benchmarking against Simulated Annealing and Population Annealing, we demonstrate that Global Annealing not only surpasses the performance of Simulated Annealing but also exhibits greater robustness than Population Annealing, maintaining effectiveness across problem hardness and system size without hyperparameter tuning. These results provide clear and robust evidence that a machine learning--assisted optimization method can exceed the capabilities of classical state-of-the-art techniques in a combinatorial optimization setting.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>组合优化问题在实践应用和优化方法发展中均处于核心地位。尽管经典与量子算法历经数十年发展已日趋完善，但机器学习辅助方法相对较新，且尚未能稳定超越简单的经典前沿方法。本文聚焦于一类二次无约束二进制优化问题，特别是三维伊辛自旋玻璃中寻找最小能量构型的挑战。我们采用一种全局退火蒙特卡洛算法，该算法将标准局部移动与通过机器学习提出的全局移动相结合。研究表明，局部移动对实现最优性能至关重要。通过与模拟退火和群体退火进行基准测试，我们证明全局退火不仅性能超越模拟退火，而且比群体退火更具鲁棒性——无需超参数调优即可在不同问题难度和系统规模下保持有效性。这些结果为机器学习辅助优化方法在组合优化场景中能够超越经典前沿技术提供了清晰而坚实的证据。</p></details> | 2026-04-19 | Luca Maria Del Bono et al. |
